language.description: Generic label meaning 'Language'; reused app-wide wherever the UI language is named (menus, settings, footer).

languageSelector.label.description: Global label for the language-selector control (footer and user dropdown). Means 'Language'.

languageSelector.ariaLabel.description: Accessibility label (screen-reader only) for the global language-selector button; means 'Change language'.

actions.signIn.description: Global action atom: sign in / log in. Reused across the whole app.

actions.loading.description: Global busy state shown on buttons/areas while loading. Includes a trailing ellipsis.

actions.tryAgain.description: Global action atom: retry a failed operation.

actions.dismiss.description: Global action atom: dismiss/close a message or banner without taking action.

actions.contactSupport.description: Global action atom linking to support/help.

actions.cancel.description: Global action atom: cancel the current action or dialog.

actions.close.description: Global action atom: close a dialog/modal.

actions.edit.description: Global action atom: edit an item.

actions.delete.description: Global action atom: delete an item.

actions.remove.description: Global action atom: remove an item (e.g. from a list/cart), softer than delete.

actions.view.description: Global action atom: view/open an item's details.

actions.submit.description: Global action atom: submit a form.

actions.processing.description: Global busy state shown while an action is being processed. Includes a trailing ellipsis.

actions.loadMore.description: Global action atom: load more items in a paginated list.

actions.connectWallet.description: Global action atom: connect a crypto wallet.

actions.goBack.description: Global action atom: navigate back to the previous step/page.

actions.approve.description: Global action atom: approve a request or transaction.

actions.reject.description: Global action atom: reject a request or transaction.

actions.disable.description: Global action atom: disable a feature/setting.

actions.copy.description: Global action atom: copy a value to the clipboard. Reused as an aria-label/button across components.

actions.copyAddress.description: Global action atom: copy a wallet address to the clipboard (aria-label).

actions.toggleSidebar.description: Global action atom: toggle the sidebar open/closed (aria-label for the sidebar rail).

status.created.description: Global order/payment status label: the order or payment has been created. Shown in status badges; keep short.

status.processing.description: Global order/payment status label: in progress. Shown in status badges; keep short.

status.succeeded.description: Global order/payment status label: completed successfully. Shown in status badges; keep short.

status.completed.description: Global order/payment status label: finished/done. Shown in status badges; keep short.

status.failed.description: Global order/payment status label: the operation failed. Shown in status badges; keep short.

status.cancelled.description: Global order/payment status label: cancelled. Shown in status badges; keep short.

status.partiallyCompleted.description: Global order status label: some items completed and others did not. Shown in status badges.

status.waitingForUser.description: Global order/payment status label: blocked pending a user action. Shown in status badges.

status.pending.description: Global order/payment status label: awaiting processing. Shown in status badges; keep short.

status.refunded.description: Global payment status label: the payment was refunded. Shown in status badges; keep short.

status.requiresCapture.description: Global payment status label: authorized but funds not yet captured. Shown in status badges.

status.unknown.description: Global fallback status label for an unrecognized order/payment state. Shown in status badges; keep short.

actions.signOut.description: Global action atom: sign the user out. Used in the account dropdown.

account.label.description: Fallback label for the user-account menu button when no name/identifier is available. Means 'Account'.

account.balance.description: Label for the NFSC balance row in the account dropdown, and the title of the balance-breakdown dialog. Means 'Balance'.

account.loadingBalanceDetails.description: Loading label shown while the balance-breakdown dialog fetches details. Includes a trailing ellipsis.

account.balanceLoadFailed.description: Error toast title shown when the balance-breakdown dialog fails to load.

account.balanceLoadFailedDescription.description: Default error toast description when balance details fail to load, used when no specific error message is available.
